title: chrysosplenium album
intro: Chrysosplenium album, also known as White spleenwort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Saxifragaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Chrysosplenium album can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and treat various health conditions.
